codeQuality.comments: Clean implementation with proper validation. Good test coverage including duplicate detection and status filtering.

VAL-M2-FEATURE-001.notes: maestro feature add creates feature with required fields: missionId, description, skillName

VAL-M2-FEATURE-002.notes: Feature with preconditions stores array of precondition strings correctly

VAL-M2-FEATURE-003.notes: Feature with expected-behavior stores behavior strings correctly

VAL-M2-FEATURE-004.notes: Feature with fulfills links to assertion IDs correctly

VAL-M2-FEATURE-005.notes: maestro feature list shows table with status column

VAL-M2-FEATURE-006.notes: Feature list --json returns JSON array with full feature objects
